svg.aria-label: Lab uptime panel — wazuh-manager, suricata, fortigate, sysmon-agents, MISP, VirusTotal, abuse.ch with 7-day uptime sparklines and last-check timestamps
svg.title: Lab uptime panel · last 7d
svg.desc: Per-component status: green = up, amber = degraded. Each row shows a 7-day sparkline of synthetic uptime samples, an overall percent, last-checked timestamp, and current latency.
